speaker: MATT
raw_text: (Kermit voice) Roll initiative. (normal voice) All right, so, on that note, I believe it's time to dive into tonight's episode of Critical Role. [click, TV static] [groovy Critical Role theme]

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: For a split-second, you sounded like Kermit the Frog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (Kermit voice) Oh, I'm just trying to make sure that you get your proper announcements there for your game. Okay. Let's play some D&D. (laughter)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: They rolled pretty high. Everyone roll initiative, but you guys will be out of this round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I am one with the water.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys all quickly emerge from the water below, your eyes focusing. There is no light source in this chamber. So for those of you-- you have your darkvision on. You guys all have darkvision, I am pretty sure, except for you, Caleb. So you're relying on the rest of them to give any sort of presence--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What is happening? Why is there a remote control?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, he's putting water effects on it! Shut up!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I would need you guys to place yourselves amongst this pool.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I didn't think I'd enjoy this quite so soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Kiri and Nott exist on the outskirts.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys glance up, the first thing you see is there is one merrow right there who's currently talking and discussing with one right here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is wrong. This is right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Place yourselves where you want to be.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's one at the base of this, right there. Up at the top, facing away, is the one that you had seen at the top of the stairs, Fjord.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's the one that was distracted.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys all emerge headfirst from the water, everybody gets a surprise round except for Yasha and Molly, unfortunately. You two did not roll high enough to beat the stealth.
